name: The Amazing World of Kreskin
overview: Kreskin, also known as The Amazing Kreskin, is an American mentalist who entertained studio audiences with this TV series from 1972 to 1975. It was broadcast throughout Canada on CTV and distributed in syndication in the US. The series was produced in Ottawa, Ontario at the CJOH-TV studios.

trailers.title: The Amazing World of Kreskin 1972 TV promo
